title: Trichocaulon piliferum

The plant is classified in the genus Trichocaulon, which is a group of plants that are typically found in tropical regions. Trichocaulon piliferum is further classified in the family Asparagaceae, which is a large family of monocotyledonous plants. The classification of Trichocaulon piliferum is a subject of ongoing research in the field of botany.
